graphs.sparql_query_content:
PREFIX rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
PREFIX brso: <http://purl.org.jp/brso/>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>

# medaka_test → medaka_strains
#
# dc:identifier is misspelled in two ways in the source graph:
#   dc:identifiere (297 occurrences, all subjects) and dc:identifire (40 occurrences, subset).
# UNION captures both; column is named medaka_id (correct spelling).
#
# brso:BiologicalResource type filter is placed INSIDE each UNION branch (not after).
# The endpoint at knowledge.brc.riken.jp fails to return results when the type
# constraint is placed outside the UNION.
#
# rdfs:label: untagged (lang='') in source — 1 label per BiologicalResource, no filter needed.
# dc:description: 54 strains have both @en and @ja versions; FILTER(LANG=...) with
#   SINGLE quotes must be used — this endpoint returns 0 rows when double-quoted
#   string literals appear inside OPTIONAL FILTER blocks after a UNION.
# deposit_org: blank node resolved to English rdfs:label (single-quoted 'en').

SELECT DISTINCT
  ?medaka_id
  (COALESCE(?label,       "NA") AS ?label)
  (COALESCE(?description, "NA") AS ?description)
  (COALESCE(?deposit_org, "NA") AS ?deposit_org)
  (COALESCE(STR(?provider), "NA") AS ?provider)
  (COALESCE(STR(?homepage), "NA") AS ?homepage)
WHERE {
  GRAPH <http://metadb.riken.jp/db/medaka_test> {

    {
      ?s <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/identifiere> ?medaka_id .
      ?s rdf:type brso:BiologicalResource .
    }
    UNION
    {
      ?s <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/identifire> ?medaka_id .
      ?s rdf:type brso:BiologicalResource .
    }

    OPTIONAL { ?s rdfs:label ?label }
    OPTIONAL {
      ?s dc:description ?description .
      FILTER(LANG(?description) = 'en')
    }
    OPTIONAL {
      ?s brso:deposit_organization ?org .
      ?org rdfs:label ?deposit_org .
      FILTER(LANG(?deposit_org) = 'en')
    }
    OPTIONAL { ?s brso:provider ?provider }
    OPTIONAL { ?s foaf:homepage ?homepage }
  }
}
ORDER BY ?medaka_id

PREFIX sio: <http://semanticscience.org/resource/>

# medaka_disease_similarityScore → medaka_disease_similarity
# Reified structure: assoc node --SIO_000628--> medaka IRI
#                               --SIO_000628--> disease IRI
#                               --SIO_000216--> metric node --SIO_000300--> score
# Only cosine similarity is present in this graph.
# disease_id is normalised to CURIE format: Orphanet:NNN or OMIM:NNN.
# disease_source is derived from the disease IRI prefix.
#
# NOTE: The endpoint at knowledge.brc.riken.jp returns incomplete results for the
# same-predicate-twice join pattern (?assoc SIO_000628 ?medaka ; SIO_000628 ?disease)
# when medaka IRI is bound via FILTER rather than a specific IRI.
# In practice 02_extract.py builds this table by parsing data/raw/*_triples.tsv
# in Python to avoid the endpoint quirk. This .rq file documents the intended logic.

SELECT
  (REPLACE(STR(?medaka), "http://lod.nbrp/Medaka/", "") AS ?medaka_id)
  (IF(CONTAINS(STR(?disease), "orphanet"),
      CONCAT("Orphanet:", REPLACE(STR(?disease), "http://identifiers.org/orphanet/", "")),
      CONCAT("OMIM:",     REPLACE(STR(?disease), "http://purl.bioontology.org/ontology/OMIM/", ""))
  ) AS ?disease_id)
  (IF(CONTAINS(STR(?disease), "orphanet"), "ordo", "omim") AS ?disease_source)
  (STR(?score) AS ?score)
WHERE {
  GRAPH <http://metadb.riken.jp/db/medaka_disease_similarityScore> {
    ?assoc sio:SIO_000628 ?medaka ;
           sio:SIO_000628 ?disease ;
           sio:SIO_000216 ?metric .
    ?metric sio:SIO_000300 ?score .
    FILTER( CONTAINS(STR(?medaka),  "lod.nbrp"))
    FILTER(!CONTAINS(STR(?disease), "lod.nbrp"))
  }
}
ORDER BY ?medaka_id ?disease_id
graphs.extraction_note: Curated CSV built from raw TSV in Python (curated_similarity_from_raw) due to endpoint quirk with same-predicate-twice SIO:628 join. The .rq file documents the intended logic.

graphs.sparql_query_content:
PREFIX obo: <http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/>

# medaka_diseaseID_throughMedgen_direct → medaka_disease_gene
# Simple flat triples: medaka_strain --RO:0003301--> disease_IRI
# disease_id normalised to CURIE: Orphanet:NNN or OMIM:NNN.
# Orphanet IRI in this graph: http://www.orpha.net/ORDO/Orphanet_<id>
# OMIM IRI in this graph:     http://identifiers.org/mim/<id>

SELECT
  (REPLACE(STR(?medaka), "http://lod.nbrp/Medaka/", "") AS ?medaka_id)
  (IF(CONTAINS(STR(?disease), "orpha.net"),
      CONCAT("Orphanet:", REPLACE(STR(?disease), "http://www.orpha.net/ORDO/Orphanet_", "")),
      CONCAT("OMIM:",     REPLACE(STR(?disease), "http://identifiers.org/mim/", ""))
  ) AS ?disease_id)
  (IF(CONTAINS(STR(?disease), "orpha.net"), "ordo", "omim") AS ?disease_source)
WHERE {
  GRAPH <http://metadb.riken.jp/db/medaka_diseaseID_throughMedgen_direct> {
    ?medaka obo:RO_0003301 ?disease .
  }
}
ORDER BY ?medaka_id ?disease_id
